feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Garden Rescue episode 15 2020 – Powys Llandrindod Wells

link.title: Garden Rescue episode 15 2020 – Powys Llandrindod Wells

entry.content:
Garden Rescue episode 15 2020 – Powys Llandrindod Wells: Lynn and Bill have bought a new home in Llandrindod Wells, Powys. It’s a long way from their old house in Zimbabwe, and the garden is very different. They have given up a huge garden with succulents, aloes and arid plants for what they call a boring lawn with no colour and too many straight lines.
Last gardening post on HDclump.com:
entry.summary: Garden Rescue episode 15 2020 – Powys Llandrindod Wells: Lynn and Bill have bought a new home in Llandrindod Wells, Powys. It’s a long way from their old house in Zimbabwe, and the garden is very different. They have given up a huge garden with succulents, aloes and arid plants for what they call a boring lawn with no colour and too many straight lines. Last gardening post on HDclump.com:

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 9 Stage 9 - De justesse ! Close call !

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 9 Stage 9 - De justesse ! Close call !

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: 거동이 불편한 가족과 함께 사는 분들이 주목해야 할 복지혜택

link.title: 거동이 불편한 가족과 함께 사는 분들이 주목해야 할 복지혜택

entry.content:
아직은 서울시에만 시행하고 있는 복지정책. 본인 또는 가족의 돌봄과 관련하여 궁금증과 어려움을 가진 서울시민을 대상으로 하며, 만 50세 이상 성인 또는 장애인(모든연령)을 주요 대상으로 합니다.
돌봄SOS서비스
허프포스트코리아 홈페이지 : huffingtonpost.kr
페이스북 : facebook.com/huffpostkorea
*인스타 : instagram.com/huffpostkorea
☎비즈니스 문의 / 제보☎ huffkorea@gmail.com
entry.summary: 아직은 서울시에만 시행하고 있는 복지정책. 본인 또는 가족의 돌봄과 관련하여 궁금증과 어려움을 가진 서울시민을 대상으로 하며, 만 50세 이상 성인 또는 장애인(모든연령)을 주요 대상으로 합니다. 돌봄SOS서비스 허프포스트코리아 홈페이지 : huffingtonpost.kr 페이스북 : facebook.com/huffpostkorea *인스타 : instagram.com/huffpostkorea ☎비즈니스 문의 / 제보☎ huffkorea@gmail.com

entry.title: César Villaluz se dijo listo para volver al futbol mexicano

link.title: César Villaluz se dijo listo para volver al futbol mexicano

entry.content:
Luego de anunciar su salida del San Pedro de Guatemala, César Villaluz, quien fuera campeón del mundo con la Selección Nacional Sub-17 en 2005, está buscando su regreso al futbol mexicano.
“La idea es poder seguir jugando futbol, ahorita buscar algo más cerca. Si se llega a dar y sino pues esperar este torneo para ver que todo se pueda resolver acá de la mejor manera”, comentó a ESPN.
Suscríbete a nuestro canal en:
Para más noticias de tus deportes favoritos entra a:
Síguenos en nuestras redes sociales: Facebook:
Instagram:
Tik Tok:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Luego de anunciar su salida del San Pedro de Guatemala, César Villaluz, quien fuera campeón del mundo con la Selección Nacional Sub-17 en 2005, está buscando su regreso al futbol mexicano. “La idea es poder seguir jugando futbol, ahorita buscar algo más cerca. Si se llega a dar y sino pues esperar este torneo para ver que todo se pueda resolver acá de la mejor manera”, comentó a ESPN. entry.title: Amid standoff with China, Nimmu-Padam-Darcha road nears completion

link.title: Amid standoff with China, Nimmu-Padam-Darcha road nears completion

entry.content: Amid the standoff with China, the Border Roads Organisation (BRO) is almost ready with Nimmu-Padam-Darcha road which will connect Manali to Leh making a hassle-free speedy travel for security forces.
entry.summary: Amid the standoff with China, the Border Roads Organisation (BRO) is almost ready with Nimmu-Padam-Darcha road which will connect Manali to Leh making a hassle-free speedy travel for security forces.

entry.title: Live from the Space Stage: A HALYX Story

link.title: Live from the Space Stage: A HALYX Story

entry.content: Trailer for ‘Live from the Space Stage: A HALYX Story’ starring Mike Carlson, Jeanette Clinger, Jeanie Cunningham, Tony Coppola, Rick Damigella
entry.summary: Trailer for ‘Live from the Space Stage: A HALYX Story’ starring Mike Carlson, Jeanette Clinger, Jeanie Cunningham, Tony Coppola, Rick Damigella

entry.title: Therese Malvar, binalikan ang moment na naka-tie ang sarili sa acting award PEP Live Choice Cuts

link.title: Therese Malvar, binalikan ang moment na naka-tie ang sarili sa acting award PEP Live Choice Cuts

entry.content:
Gumawa ng history si Therese Malvar nang manalo itong best supporting actress para sa dalawang pelikulang kasali sa 2018 Cinemalaya Independent Film Festival.
Kuwento ni Therese kay Jimpy Anarcon sa kanyang PEP Live interview nung September 3, Huwebes, napaiyak daw agad siya kahit nung ini-introduce pa lang ng presenter ang nanalong best supporting actress.
"Nung sinabing ‘tie,’ akala ko talaga… ‘Hala, sino kaya yun?’ Yung gano’n.
"But when they said, ‘This award will be awarded to one actress but for two movies.’
"Sa sentence pa lang po na iyon, sobrang umiyak na ‘ko agad," lahad ni Therese.
Obvious na raw kasi para sa lahat ng naroon kung sino ang tinutukoy ng presenter ng award.
Nanalo si Therese sa kategoryang best supporting actress sa 2018 Cinemalaya Indie filmfest para sa mga pelikulang Distance at School Service.
Isa raw first sa 14-year history ng Cinemalaya ang nangyari kay Therese.
Para sa kabuuan ng kanyang PEP Live interview, panoorin sa link na ito:
#theresemalvar #thereseonpeplive
Host: Jimpy Anarcon
Producer: Rommel Llanes
Director: Kim Gan
Know the latest in showbiz on
Subscribe to our YouTube channel!
Follow us!
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Visit our DailyMotion channel!
Join us on Viber:
entry.summary: Gumawa ng history si Therese Malvar nang manalo itong best supporting actress para sa dalawang pelikulang kasali sa 2018 Cinemalaya Independent Film Festival. Kuwento ni Therese kay Jimpy Anarcon sa kanyang PEP Live interview nung September 3, Huwebes, napaiyak daw agad siya kahit nung ini-introduce pa lang ng presenter ang nanalong best supporting actress. "Nung sinabing ‘tie,’ akala ko talaga… ‘Hala, sino kaya yun?’ Yung gano’n. "But when they said, ‘This award will be awarded to one actress but for two movies.’ "Sa sentence pa lang po na iyon, sobrang umiyak na ‘ko agad," lahad ni Therese. Obvious na raw kasi para sa lahat ng naroon kung sino ang tinutukoy ng presenter ng award. Nanalo si Therese sa kategoryang best supporting actress sa 2018 Cinemalaya Indie filmfest para sa mga pelikulang Distance at School Service. Isa raw first sa 14-year history ng Cinemalaya ang nangyari kay Therese. Para sa kabuuan ng kanyang PEP Live interview, panoorin sa link na ito: #theresemalvar #thereseonpeplive Host: Jimpy Anarcon Producer: Rommel Llanes Director: Kim Gan Know the latest in showbiz on Subscribe to our YouTube channel! entry.title: IPL 2020 : Fan Asks About CSK’s Vice-Captain? CSK’s ‘Wise’ Reply…!! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: IPL 2020 : Fan Asks About CSK’s Vice-Captain? CSK’s ‘Wise’ Reply…!! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Chennai Super Kings (CSK) star player Suresh Raina had returned to India from UAE due to ‘personal reasons’ and will miss the entire IPL 2020 season, the franchise informed on August 29.
#IPL2020
#SureshRaina
#SureshRainaoutofIPL
#WhistlePodu
#NSrinivasan
#MSDhoni
#CSK
#WiseCaptain
#chennaisuperkings
#Harbhajansingh
#mumbaiindians
#ViratKohli
#RohitSharma
#RCB
#cricket
#teamindia
#MIvsRCB
సురేశ్ రైనా స్వదేశానికి రావడంతో ఓ అభిమాని ట్విటర్‌లో సీఎస్‌కేను ఒక ఆసక్తికర ప్రశ్న వేశాడు. ఈసారి మన చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్ టీమ్‌కు వైస్‌ కెప్టెన్‌ ఎవరని అడిగాడు. దానికి స్పందించిన సీఎస్‌కే మజమాన్యం సదరు అభిమానికి అదిరేలా పంచ్ ఇచ్చింది.
entry.summary: Chennai Super Kings (CSK) star player Suresh Raina had returned to India from UAE due to ‘personal reasons’ and will miss the entire IPL 2020 season, the franchise informed on August 29. #IPL2020 #SureshRaina #SureshRainaoutofIPL #WhistlePodu #NSrinivasan #MSDhoni #CSK #WiseCaptain #chennaisuperkings #Harbhajansingh #mumbaiindians #ViratKohli #RohitSharma #RCB #cricket #teamindia #MIvsRCB సురేశ్ రైనా స్వదేశానికి రావడంతో ఓ అభిమాని ట్విటర్‌లో సీఎస్‌కేను ఒక ఆసక్తికర ప్రశ్న వేశాడు. ఈసారి మన చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్ టీమ్‌కు వైస్‌ కెప్టెన్‌ ఎవరని అడిగాడు. దానికి స్పందించిన సీఎస్‌కే మజమాన్యం సదరు అభిమానికి అదిరేలా పంచ్ ఇచ్చింది.

entry.title: Sanjay Raut और Kangana Ranaut में जुबानी जंग, डंके की चोट पर कही ये बात Sushant वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sanjay Raut और Kangana Ranaut में जुबानी जंग, डंके की चोट पर कही ये बात Sushant वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The verbal war continues between Shiv Sena leader Sanjay Raut and Bollywood actress Kangana Ranaut. When targeting each other, the dignity of language is also being broken. Both are confused on Kangana Ranaut’s statement about Mumbai. Joker tweets were attacked in both the days. You also see .. All day long story
शिवसेना नेता संजय राउत और बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस कंगना रनौत में जुबानी जंग जारी है. एक दूसरे पर निशाना साधने पर भाषा की मर्यादा भी तोड़ी जा रही है. मुंबई को लेकर दिए कंगना रनौत के बयान पर दोनों उलझ गए है. दिनभर दोनों में जबकर ट्वीट पर हमले हुए. आप भी देखिए.. पूरे दिन भर की कहानी
#SanjayRaut #KanganaRanaut #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: The verbal war continues between Shiv Sena leader Sanjay Raut and Bollywood actress Kangana Ranaut. When targeting each other, the dignity of language is also being broken. Both are confused on Kangana Ranaut’s statement about Mumbai. Joker tweets were attacked in both the days. You also see .. All day long story शिवसेना नेता संजय राउत और बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस कंगना रनौत में जुबानी जंग जारी है. एक दूसरे पर निशाना साधने पर भाषा की मर्यादा भी तोड़ी जा रही है. मुंबई को लेकर दिए कंगना रनौत के बयान पर दोनों उलझ गए है. दिनभर दोनों में जबकर ट्वीट पर हमले हुए. आप भी देखिए.. पूरे दिन भर की कहानी #SanjayRaut #KanganaRanaut #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Kenapa view MV Aina Abdul sendu? Lagu sedap, vokal mantap tapi netizen tak support

link.title: Kenapa view MV Aina Abdul sendu? Lagu sedap, vokal mantap tapi netizen tak support

entry.content:
PENYANYI Aina Abdul memberitahu dia tidak ralat apabila muzik video lagu baharunya iaitu Maybe / Kelip2 dibandingkan dengan hasil karya beberapa artis lain.
Kata Aina atau nama sebenar Nurul Aina Abdul Ghani, 27, dia percaya soal rezeki dan yakin suatu hari nanti usahanya akan mendatangkan hasil.
“Semuanya bergantung kepada rezeki, semua orang boleh menilai dengan baik dan bebas untuk mendengar apa yang mereka inginkan.
“Walaupun tontonan video muzik saya rendah, saya percaya ia akan berkembang dan suatu hari saya akan capai apa yang diinginkan,” katanya kepada mStar.
Tambahnya, dia pernah berada di satu tahap di mana enggan membaca komen-komen positif kerana tidak ingin leka dengan pujian pendengar.
entry.summary: PENYANYI Aina Abdul memberitahu dia tidak ralat apabila muzik video lagu baharunya iaitu Maybe / Kelip2 dibandingkan dengan hasil karya beberapa artis lain. Kata Aina atau nama sebenar Nurul Aina Abdul Ghani, 27, dia percaya soal rezeki dan yakin suatu hari nanti usahanya akan mendatangkan hasil. “Semuanya bergantung kepada rezeki, semua orang boleh menilai dengan baik dan bebas untuk mendengar apa yang mereka inginkan. “Walaupun tontonan video muzik saya rendah, saya percaya ia akan berkembang dan suatu hari saya akan capai apa yang diinginkan,” katanya kepada mStar. Tambahnya, dia pernah berada di satu tahap di mana enggan membaca komen-komen positif kerana tidak ingin leka dengan pujian pendengar.

entry.title: L’accessibilité de la culture passe par la gratuité

link.title: L’accessibilité de la culture passe par la gratuité

entry.content:
L’un des avantages de ces visites virtuelles est leur gratuité.
Il est à rappeler que les musées nationaux sont gratuits en France pour les moins de 26 ans et une grande partie des écoles.
Plus d’infos :

entry.title: Le Snap #12 : Windows 95 fête ses vingt-cinq ans

link.title: Le Snap #12 : Windows 95 fête ses vingt-cinq ans

entry.content: L’anniversaire d’un système d’exploitation qui ne nous rajeunit pas, la nouvelle montre connectée anti Covid-19 de Fitbit, mais aussi les ennuis de Facebook en Thaïlande et la suite du feuilleton du rachat de Tiktok aux États-Unis… le meilleur du web de cette semaine compilé pour vous dans le Snap.
entry.summary: L’anniversaire d’un système d’exploitation qui ne nous rajeunit pas, la nouvelle montre connectée anti Covid-19 de Fitbit, mais aussi les ennuis de Facebook en Thaïlande et la suite du feuilleton du rachat de Tiktok aux États-Unis… le meilleur du web de cette semaine compilé pour vous dans le Snap.

entry.title: Survey Finds LGBTQ Americans Bearing Brunt Of COVID-19 Economic Crash

link.title: Survey Finds LGBTQ Americans Bearing Brunt Of COVID-19 Economic Crash

entry.content:
The economic fallout from the coronavirus pandemic is having a harsher impact on LGBT+ Americans.
This is in comparison to the general population, said a survey released on Friday.
The survey showed gay and trans people 30% more likely to have lost their jobs since May.
LGBT+ employees are 20% more likely to have had hours reduced than their straight colleagues.
That figure rises to 44% among gay and trans people of color as well.
entry.summary: The economic fallout from the coronavirus pandemic is having a harsher impact on LGBT+ Americans. This is in comparison to the general population, said a survey released on Friday. The survey showed gay and trans people 30% more likely to have lost their jobs since May. LGBT+ employees are 20% more likely to have had hours reduced than their straight colleagues. That figure rises to 44% among gay and trans people of color as well.

entry.title: Environmental crime unit to be set up to protect country’s natural resources, says Tuan Ibrahim

link.title: Environmental crime unit to be set up to protect country’s natural resources, says Tuan Ibrahim

entry.content:
An environmental crimes unit will be set up soon to tackle illegal activities that threaten the country’s natural resources, says Datuk Seri Tuan Ibrahim Tuan Man.
The Environment and Water Minister said that at his visit to the Air Selangor Water Treatment Plant in Bestari Jaya to get updates on water supply restoration efforts to affected households in the Klang Valley on Monday (Sept 7), adding that plans are in place to coordinate efforts between the ministry, police and the armed forces to protect precious resources from being polluted and affecting the country’s security.
Separately, Tuan Ibrahim said water supply is expected to be fully restored by 6am on Wednesday (Sept 9).
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: An environmental crimes unit will be set up soon to tackle illegal activities that threaten the country’s natural resources, says Datuk Seri Tuan Ibrahim Tuan Man. The Environment and Water Minister said that at his visit to the Air Selangor Water Treatment Plant in Bestari Jaya to get updates on water supply restoration efforts to affected households in the Klang Valley on Monday (Sept 7), adding that plans are in place to coordinate efforts between the ministry, police and the armed forces to protect precious resources from being polluted and affecting the country’s security. Separately, Tuan Ibrahim said water supply is expected to be fully restored by 6am on Wednesday (Sept 9). Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Interdit de suicide assisté, Alain Cocq a décidé de se laisser mourir

link.title: Interdit de suicide assisté, Alain Cocq a décidé de se laisser mourir

entry.content: Interdit de suicide assisté, Alain Cocq a décidé de cesser de s’alimenter et de s’hydrater dès ce vendredi soir, à minuit.View on euronews
entry.summary: Interdit de suicide assisté, Alain Cocq a décidé de cesser de s’alimenter et de s’hydrater dès ce vendredi soir, à minuit.View on euronews

entry.title: Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’

link.title: Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’

entry.content:
Brad Keselowski talks about his drive and what keeps him competitive in NASCAR’s highest level.
Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’
Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’
Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’
entry.summary: Brad Keselowski talks about his drive and what keeps him competitive in NASCAR’s highest level.Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’ Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’ Keselowski on playoff motivation: ‘I don’t like to suck’

entry.title: Daur Ulang Limbah Plastik Jadi Produk Bernilai Jual

link.title: Daur Ulang Limbah Plastik Jadi Produk Bernilai Jual

entry.content:
• Hidup tanpa menggunakan barang berbahan plastik terdengar sulit, tapi bukan berarti kita tak bisa berupaya meminimalisir sampah plastik yang berakhir di tempat pembuangan akhir.
    Salah satu pegiat daur ulang sampah plastik di Jakarta, Mohammad Baedowy membuktikan bahwa sampah plastik masih memiliki nilai ekonomi yang tinggi.
    Di pabrik pengolahan inilah, sampah plastik yang dibeli dari lapak pemulung dikumpulkan.
    Salah satunya sampah plastik jenis PET yang banyak beredar dan memang dikenal ramah lingkungan karena mudah didaur ulang.
    "Beberapa plastik itu ada jenis-jenisnya, misalnya ada bekas botol air mineral itu pet, itu nanti akan dibuat menjadi benang polyster. Kemudian juga ada yang pp itu gelas air mineral, itu nanti akan dibuat menjadi tali raffia atau jadi karung. Lalu seperti bekas botol olibekas botol sampo, bekas botol lotion, itu jenisnya hdpe nanti bisa dibikin menjadi rumahnya sapu yang ada di pabrik saya juga dan jenis-jenis bentuk lainnya tergantung jadi moldingnya," ujar Mohammad Baedowy penggiat daur ulang sampah.
    Setelah selesai dipilah dan dicuci, sampah akan dicacah menggunakan mesin. Hasil cacahan plastik inilah yang dijual ke pabrik untuk diolah kembali bahkan ada yang diekspor ke luar negeri.
    Mengolah sampah plastik, bukan tanggung jawab Baedowy sendiri. Di rumah masing masing, warga bisa mulai memilah dan mendaur ulang plastik bekas pakai agar tak mencemari lingkungan.
entry.summary: Hidup tanpa menggunakan barang berbahan plastik terdengar sulit, tapi bukan berarti kita tak bisa berupaya meminimalisir sampah plastik yang berakhir di tempat pembuangan akhir. Salah satu pegiat daur ulang sampah plastik di Jakarta, Mohammad Baedowy membuktikan bahwa sampah plastik masih memiliki nilai ekonomi yang tinggi. Di pabrik pengolahan inilah, sampah plastik yang dibeli dari lapak pemulung dikumpulkan. Salah satunya sampah plastik jenis PET yang banyak beredar dan memang dikenal ramah lingkungan karena mudah didaur ulang. "Beberapa plastik itu ada jenis-jenisnya, misalnya ada bekas botol air mineral itu pet, itu nanti akan dibuat menjadi benang polyster. Kemudian juga ada yang pp itu gelas air mineral, itu nanti akan dibuat menjadi tali raffia atau jadi karung. Lalu seperti bekas botol olibekas botol sampo, bekas botol lotion, itu jenisnya hdpe nanti bisa dibikin menjadi rumahnya sapu yang ada di pabrik saya juga dan jenis-jenis bentuk lainnya tergantung jadi moldingnya," ujar Mohammad Baedowy penggiat daur ulang sampah. Setelah selesai dipilah dan dicuci, sampah akan dicacah menggunakan mesin. Hasil cacahan plastik inilah yang dijual ke pabrik untuk diolah kembali bahkan ada yang diekspor ke luar negeri. Mengolah sampah plastik, bukan tanggung jawab Baedowy sendiri. Di rumah masing masing, warga bisa mulai memilah dan mendaur ulang plastik bekas pakai agar tak mencemari lingkungan.

entry.title: Klarifikasi Harimau Kurus di Kebun Binatang Maharani

link.title: Klarifikasi Harimau Kurus di Kebun Binatang Maharani

entry.content:
Seekor harimau di kebun binatang Maharani Zoo & Goa di Lamongan Jawa Timur sangat kurus.
Link Terkait:
Bahkan, saking kurusnya, saat dilihat dari atas, sama sekali tidak ada lekukan di bagian perutnya. Selain itu ekor harimau itu juga tampak pendek tidak seperti ekor harimau pada umumnya.
Pihak kebun binatang mengatakan harimau ini terlihat kurus karena pengambilan angle gambar yang agak kurang pas.
Dan mungkin juga harimau tersebut sedang dalam kondisi belum makan, karena memang harimau di kebun binatang tersebut hanya makan satu kali sehari.
#Harimau #Kurus #KebunBinatang
Video Editor: Fatikha Rizky Asteria.N
=================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
aradotcom/Twitter:
entry.summary: Seekor harimau di kebun binatang Maharani Zoo & Goa di Lamongan Jawa Timur sangat kurus. Link Terkait: Bahkan, saking kurusnya, saat dilihat dari atas, sama sekali tidak ada lekukan di bagian perutnya. Selain itu ekor harimau itu juga tampak pendek tidak seperti ekor harimau pada umumnya. Pihak kebun binatang mengatakan harimau ini terlihat kurus karena pengambilan angle gambar yang agak kurang pas. Dan mungkin juga harimau tersebut sedang dalam kondisi belum makan, karena memang harimau di kebun binatang tersebut hanya makan satu kali sehari. #Harimau #Kurus #KebunBinatang Video Editor: Fatikha Rizky Asteria.N ================================= Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: aradotcom/Twitter:

entry.title: At least 60 houses were destroyed after a fire hit an informal settler community in Davao City

link.title: At least 60 houses were destroyed after a fire hit an informal settler community in Davao City

entry.content:
At least 60 houses were destroyed after a fire hit an informal settler community in Brgy. Leon Garcia, Davao City Thursday dawn.
The fire also razed a neighboring two-story school building. Initial reports show that fire was reportedly due to arson. (MB video by Keith Bacongco)
entry.summary: At least 60 houses were destroyed after a fire hit an informal settler community in Brgy. Leon Garcia, Davao City Thursday dawn. The fire also razed a neighboring two-story school building. Initial reports show that fire was reportedly due to arson. (MB video by Keith Bacongco)

entry.title: Ces jouets de votre enfance valent désormais une vraie fortune

link.title: Ces jouets de votre enfance valent désormais une vraie fortune

entry.content: Petit coup de nostalgie, vous ressortez vos vieux jouets d’enfant… Attention, ne les jetez pas, certains peuvent vous rendre riche.
entry.summary: Petit coup de nostalgie, vous ressortez vos vieux jouets d’enfant… Attention, ne les jetez pas, certains peuvent vous rendre riche.

entry.title: Fans gather at Kensington Palace, London, to remember Princess Diana, 23 years after her death

link.title: Fans gather at Kensington Palace, London, to remember Princess Diana, 23 years after her death

entry.content: Footage from outside the gates of Kensington Palace where royal superfans have begun turning up to commemorate the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, who died 23 years ago tomorrow (August 31). The fans dressed the gates of the Palace with royal memorabilia, flowers and posters of the Princess.
entry.summary: Footage from outside the gates of Kensington Palace where royal superfans have begun turning up to commemorate the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, who died 23 years ago tomorrow (August 31). The fans dressed the gates of the Palace with royal memorabilia, flowers and posters of the Princess.

entry.title: Duterte justifies pardon for Pemberton Evening wRap

link.title: Duterte justifies pardon for Pemberton Evening wRap

entry.content:
Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world:
- Duterte defends pardon: ‘You have not treated Pemberton fairly.’ ‘If there is a time that you are called on to be fair, be fair,’ says President Rodrigo Duterte.
- Despite security concerns, Lorenzana signs contract with China-backed telco. The agreement allows China-backed telco Dito Telecommunity to build cell sites inside Philippine military camps.
- Philippine government to ban home quarantine of COVID-19 cases. The Philippine government will ban the home quarantine of people who have COVID-19, Interior Secretary Eduardo Año said on Tuesday, September 8.
- Environmental groups launch petition vs dumping of crushed dolomite in Manila Bay. The petition enumerates the law and regulations violated by the white sand project in Manila Bay.
- FALSE: Bataan Nuclear Power Plant to reopen. President Rodrigo Duterte signed an executive order for a study on nuclear energy, and not to open or reopen a nuclear power plant.
entry.summary: Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world: - Duterte defends pardon: ‘You have not treated Pemberton fairly.’ ‘If there is a time that you are called on to be fair, be fair,’ says President Rodrigo Duterte. - Despite security concerns, Lorenzana signs contract with China-backed telco. The agreement allows China-backed telco Dito Telecommunity to build cell sites inside Philippine military camps. - Philippine government to ban home quarantine of COVID-19 cases. The Philippine government will ban the home quarantine of people who have COVID-19, Interior Secretary Eduardo Año said on Tuesday, September 8. - Environmental groups launch petition vs dumping of crushed dolomite in Manila Bay. The petition enumerates the law and regulations violated by the white sand project in Manila Bay. - FALSE: Bataan Nuclear Power Plant to reopen. President Rodrigo Duterte signed an executive order for a study on nuclear energy, and not to open or reopen a nuclear power plant.

entry.title: Lesti Kejora dan Rizky Billar Naik Daun, Dewi Perssik Akui Keduanya Tak Kena Star Syndrome

link.title: Lesti Kejora dan Rizky Billar Naik Daun, Dewi Perssik Akui Keduanya Tak Kena Star Syndrome

entry.content:
Hubungan Lesti Kejora dengan Rizky Billar kini menjadi perhatian warganet.
Link terkait:
Banyak yang tak sabar menunggu keduanya jadian, tapi tak sedikit pula yang menilai kalau hubungan keduanya hanya gimmick atau setingan. Selengkapnya dalam video ini.
#RizkyBillar #LestiKejora
Video Editor: Sulistyo Jati
==================================

Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
